mechanisms.name: promise_to_proof_distance
mechanisms.claim: A first screen should expose the first truthful proof, answer map, or a clearly bounded evidence gap instead of merely naming the topic.

mechanisms.name: visual_counterevidence_joke
mechanisms.claim: In a light narrative, the real image can act as a second speaker that immediately contradicts a serious verbal premise and gives comments a shared semantic joke to extend.

mechanisms.name: work_object_first_screen
mechanisms.claim: For high-intent tasks, show the actual form, list, interface or tool the reader will use, then teach its context and limits.
limitations: real documents appear in both high and low proxy samples
legal accuracy and jurisdiction are separate hard gates

mechanisms.name: transformation_contract
mechanisms.claim: A transformation opener should make the starting problem, perceptible outcome and meaningful constraint or cost legible, then close the gap with process evidence.

global_limitations: Search order is a momentary personalized surface, not a platform ranking.
Public likes/saves/comments are engagement proxies, not impressions, reach, CTR or recommendation weight.
Account size, post age, paid distribution, external traffic, topic demand and full-page fulfillment were not controlled.
No original visual asset is licensed for reuse.
